testcase.name: test_add_place_of_interest

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/register': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/register?"

Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/register?
